text: These two discount retailers have very long histories of creating shareholder wealth.

title: 7 Undervalued Retail Stocks to Buy in January 2023
text: The retail sector could be facing a brighter outlook as signs of positivity have begun to emerge. The economy continues to struggle with inflation and a strong employment market.

title: The TJX Companies (TJX) Gains on Online Business & Marketing
text: The TJX Companies' (TJX) off-price model, strategic store locations and impressive online business is working well.

title: Does TJX Have More Room To Run Or Will It Sink Into New Base?
text: Clothing and home goods retailer TJX cleared a buy point above $81.17 Friday but reversed lower with the broad market Monday. It remains in potential buy range.
